name: alchemy-codex-local-mode
description: Explicit Codex-native image planning for conversation-only results

interface.shortDescription: Alchemy prompt planning for Codex native ImageGen.
interface.longDescription: A disabled-by-default planning-only plugin. Codex calls local stdio MCP for frozen V3 prompts and creates images in the conversation itself.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Codex Native ImageGen Mode only when I explicitly request it. Plan with Alchemy MCP, then create each planned image in this conversation; do not treat it as an Alchemy delivery.
